---
title: 'Preston Markus Wolfe'
date: '2010-12-07T16:54:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Preston Markus Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2113798038417131661'
blogger_filename: '/2010/12/preston-markus-wolfe.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Preston Markus Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

I'm going to start keeping a journal of things I observe or see or want to tell you. I hope we both learn from it.
